title: COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER - 211info
text: YMCA OF BAKER COUNTY COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a variety of recreation opportunities including an aquatic center, gym, group exercise classes, and youth and adult sports. 3715 Pocahontas Road Baker City, OR 97814 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies by service (541) 523-8326 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 523-9622 Fitness Center (541) 523-8328 Swim Center Swim Center (541) 523-8326 Fitness center (541) 523-9623 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service; scholarships available DOCUMENTS: Proof of income if applying for scholarship AREA SERVED: Baker County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 6am-6pm, Saturday 8am-4pm Services: General Recreational Activities/Sports Preschools Swimming Facilities Y Facilities Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - ADULT AND SENIOR PROGRAMS SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - CAMPS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
